narrative.description: Game Freak's portable RPG launched a global phenomenon by combining creature collection, turn-based battles, and gym-badge progression across the Kanto region with link-cable trading as a social mechanic.
narrative.core_loop: Catch and train Pokémon, defeat gym leaders for badges, counter type weaknesses in battles, and challenge the Elite Four after completing the Pokédex route.

mechanics.map_notes: Six-Pokémon party battles resolve in turn order with type effectiveness tables.
mechanics.expression: Six-Pokémon party battles resolve in turn order with type effectiveness tables.

mechanics.map_notes: Eight gym badges and HMs gate route access across Kanto.
mechanics.expression: Eight gym badges and HMs gate route access across Kanto.

mechanics.map_notes: Pokédex completion and badge collection drive optional and mandatory progression.
mechanics.expression: Pokédex completion and badge collection drive optional and mandatory progression.

mechanics.map_notes: Experience points level Pokémon stats and unlock new moves.
mechanics.expression: Experience points level Pokémon stats and unlock new moves.

mechanics.map_notes: Route-based overworld connects towns, caves, and gyms freely after gating clears.
mechanics.expression: Route-based overworld connects towns, caves, and gyms freely after gating clears.

mechanics.map_notes: Legendary Pokémon, items, and side areas reward thorough exploration.
mechanics.expression: Legendary Pokémon, items, and side areas reward thorough exploration.

mechanics.map_notes: Poké Marts sell balls, potions, and TMs expanding capture and battle options.
mechanics.expression: Poké Marts sell balls, potions, and TMs expanding capture and battle options.

mechanics.map_notes: Trainer battles and item finds fund team maintenance and supplies.
mechanics.expression: Trainer battles and item finds fund team maintenance and supplies.

mechanics.map_notes: Cut, Surf, and Strength HMs open new traversal routes.
mechanics.expression: Cut, Surf, and Strength HMs open new traversal routes.

mechanics.map_notes: Gym leaders use signature teams with predictable type themes.
mechanics.expression: Gym leaders use signature teams with predictable type themes.

mechanics.map_notes: Elite Four gauntlet chains six consecutive boss-level battles.
mechanics.expression: Elite Four gauntlet chains six consecutive boss-level battles.

mechanics.map_notes: HP pools deplete in battle; fainted Pokémon require healing.
mechanics.expression: HP pools deplete in battle; fainted Pokémon require healing.

mechanics.map_notes: Pokémon Centers heal and save progress between routes.
mechanics.expression: Pokémon Centers heal and save progress between routes.

mechanics.map_notes: Caves and water routes require HM tools and item management.
mechanics.expression: Caves and water routes require HM tools and item management.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Pokémon Red/Blue through its core rpg loop.
